# Hypothesis Engine

## Purpose

Every campaign variant should exist because of a hypothesis.

## Template

```text
If [buyer state] sees [angle] with [proof] and [offer],
then [metric] will improve because [mechanism].
```

## Good hypothesis

```text
If solution-aware SaaS buyers see a workflow demo with before/after proof and no-credit-card sandbox,
then signup-to-activation rate will improve because buyers can verify usefulness without trusting the ad.
```

## Bad hypothesis

```text
This headline sounds better.
```

## Rule

No hypothesis, no variant.
